startScreen.subtitle: Handle microbes safely — choose the right protective gear and the right laboratory.

howToPlay.title: How to play
steps: Remember the BSL level — it decides everything. If you need to reread these instructions, visit the INFO desk in the corridor.
Go to the lecture room to read the microbe's details and its BSL level.
In the lecture room you can also study the materials to learn about different microbes and BSL classes (1–4).
Go to the dressing room and open the closet (press E).
Put on the protective equipment the level requires (lab coat, mask, glasses…).
Go to the matching BSL room (1–4).
Press E at the dark green ring to handle the microbe.
The game checks your work — were the equipment and room correct for this microbe?
Wash up at the shower or eyewash station to decontaminate before leaving.
A new microbe is drawn — try again!
After several rounds, see your summary: score, correct vs. wrong, and the levels you mastered.
You can leave any time through the Exit — the game shuts down.
howToPlay.controls: Controls: Arrow keys / click to move · E or click to interact · Close button to close windows

lecturePanel.title: Lecture Materials
lecturePanel.description: Click a link below to open the lecture material in a new tab.

answerPopup.equipmentCorrect: Your protective equipment matched the required setup.
answerPopup.equipmentIncorrect: Your protective equipment did not fully match the required setup.
